executives.name: Craig Federighi
executives.background: Craig Federighi is Apple’s senior vice president of Software Engineering, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Craig oversees the development of iOS, iPadOS, and macOS. His teams are responsible for delivering the software at the heart of Apple’s products, including the user interface, applications, and frameworks.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Technology Officer / Vice President, Internet Services

executives.name: Robert Calderoni
executives.background: Robert Calderoni was the Executive Chairman of Citrix Systems, Inc. and previously served as Chairman and CEO of Ariba, Inc.
